action.reasoning: Observation: first SchNet/PyG run segfaulted after ~669s with no eval, likely from radius-graph/CUDA extension instability or excessive runtime. Analysis: need a robust end-to-end baseline immediately; PyG SchNet is risky. Decision: replace with a pure PyTorch padded 3D pair-distance message-passing model avoiding torch-cluster/radius_graph, train only 2 epochs, locally smoke-test predict.py on val/test-like data, then submit eval.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 2 --batch_size 256 --hidden_dim 128 --num_layers 3 --out checkpoints/pairmpnn.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/pairmpnn.pt --output smoke_preds.json
